articles.title: Truce offers moment of respite for battered Tehran
articles.body: Residents of Iran’s capital seek to begin picking up the pieces of their lives even if few believe conflict is truly over

articles.title: Iran demands crypto fees for ships passing Hormuz during ceasefire
articles.body: Country’s oil exporters’ union says toll to be paid in cryptocurrency and vessels monitored for weapons
